items.claim: DDP slowed down significantly during the fight.
items.quote: he definitely slowed down a lot this fight.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein is better in most places overall.
items.quote: Abdul Hussein is mostly better everywhere.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein's pure wrestling is slightly worse than his other skills.
items.quote: I think as pure wrestling is a little worse, actually.

items.claim: The fighter relies primarily on pure wrestling and likes shooting on double legs.
items.quote: He's basically a pure wrestler. He likes shooting on double legs

items.claim: He pushes opponents to the fence on the ground to limit their scrambles and open up ground and pound.
items.quote: on the grounds, he pushes his opponents all the way to the fence, so they can't really scramble much. Then tries to open up with ground and pound from there.

items.claim: Submissions are not his strength and he does not look heavily for them.
items.quote: it's definitely not his strength and he doesn't really look too heavily for it.
